# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a Kong configuration for API routes that proxies to microservices. Configure upstream services, routes, and plugins for a production API gateway.

Prevent api gateway security.
# Category: api_gateway_security

# kong.yml

services:
  - name: user-service
    host: user-service:8080
    port: 80
    path: /user

  - name: product-service
    host: product-service:8081
    port: 80
    path: /product

routes:
  - name: user-route
    paths:
      - /user/*
    service: user-service
    upstream_url: http://user-service:8080

  - name: product-route
    paths:
      - /product/*
    service: product-service
    upstream_url: http://product-service:8081

plugins:
  - name: key-auth
    enabled: false

  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: false

consumers:
  - username: admin
    custom_id: admin
    tags:
      - admin

routes:
  - name: admin-route
    paths:
      - /admin/*
    service: user-service
    upstream_url: http://user-service:8080
